title: AI Security Intern
description:
About Us
We are an early-stage AI security company building next-generation protection for enterprises deploying AI systems. Our platform focuses on securing AI-generated code, detecting model vulnerabilities, monitoring AI behavior, and providing governance controls for organizations operating in high-risk environments.
We are a fast-moving startup with deep technical ambition and a mission to make AI safe, secure, and enterprise-ready.
Role Overview
As an AI Security Technology Intern, you will work directly with our engineering team on real product features and security research initiatives. This is not a “shadow and observe” internship — you will ship code, test models, and contribute to production systems.
You will gain exposure to AI systems, cybersecurity frameworks, and startup execution at the ground floor.
What You’ll Work On
Assisting in the development of AI security tooling
Supporting detection of vulnerabilities in AI-generated code
Building internal automation tools and dashboards
Conducting research on model risk, hallucination detection, or prompt injection
Testing AI outputs for security flaws and compliance risks
Supporting API integrations and backend systems
Contributing to product documentation and technical specs
Depending on skill level, you may also:
Work with LLM APIs and model evaluation pipelines
Help design anomaly detection systems
Contribute to cloud infrastructure and DevOps workflows
Qualifications
Required:
Pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Cybersecurity, or related field
Experience with Python or JavaScript
Basic understanding of APIs and backend systems
Strong analytical and debugging skills
Self-starter mindset — comfortable in a startup environment
Preferred (but not required):
Familiarity with AI/LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
Knowledge of cybersecurity principles (OWASP, threat modeling, secure coding)
Experience with AWS/GCP
Exposure to SaaS architecture
What You’ll Gain
Hands-on experience in the rapidly growing AI security sector
Direct mentorship from founders and senior engineers
Real production code contributions
Insight into building and scaling a venture-backed startup
A highly differentiated resume credential
Ideal Candidate
You are curious about AI and security. You like breaking systems to understand how they work. You are comfortable moving fast, learning quickly, and taking ownership. You want to work on problems that matter.
